name: Smess
author: Reuben Klamer & Perry Grant (Parker Brothers, 1970)
description: Smess: The Ninny's Chess (Reuben Klamer & Perry Grant, Parker Brothers 1970; republished as Take the Brain, and re-skinned in 1979 as All the King's Men). A 7x8 chess variant in which every square is printed with arrows: a piece may leave a square only in a direction that square's arrows point. Ninnies step one square, Numskulls ride any distance in a straight line, and the Brain steps one square. Capture the enemy Brain to win.
